query: Set up a new ElysiaJS server with Bun that has CRUD routes for /users with Typebox validation on the POST body — email, name, and optional age fields
Create an auth plugin for our Elysia API that uses derive to extract the JWT from the Authorization header and a macro for requireAuth on protected routes
Add @elysiajs/swagger to our Elysia server so it auto-generates OpenAPI docs from our Typebox schemas at /swagger
Wire up Eden treaty client in our frontend to consume the Elysia API — import the App type from the server and make type-safe calls to client.users.get()

Our Elysia route params.id is a string but we need it as a number. How do I use t.Numeric() in the params validation to coerce it? Also the type inference breaks when I store intermediate results in a variable
Add WebSocket support to our Elysia chat server — handle open, message, and close events with pub/sub on a 'chat' channel and validate incoming messages with t.Object
Implement file upload in our Elysia API — accept image/jpeg and image/png up to 5MB using t.File validation, save to ./uploads/, and return the filename
Our Elysia .use(authPlugin) is placed after the routes that need it, so the user property is undefined in the handler context. Fix the plugin ordering
Set up route groups for our API versioning — /api/v1/users and /api/v2/users as separate groups with a guard that requires an authorization header on all v2 routes
Add error handling to our Elysia server — custom ValidationError class, onError hook that returns proper 400/404/500 JSON responses, and type-safe error codes
Build a REST API using Express.js with middleware for authentication, CORS, and request logging
Set up a tRPC router with Zod validation for our Next.js app — createTRPCRouter with users.list and users.create procedures
Create a Fastify server with route validation using JSON Schema and automatic Swagger generation
Write a Cloudflare Worker that handles incoming webhooks from Stripe and verifies the signature
Build a GraphQL API with Apollo Server — define the User type, resolvers for queries and mutations, and add authentication via context
Set up Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL — define the users table schema with id, email, name, and createdAt columns
Create API route handlers in our TanStack Start app using server functions for form submission and data mutation
Configure Hono.js server with middleware for JWT authentication and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers
Build a Node.js HTTP server from scratch using the built-in http module — parse JSON bodies, handle routing manually, and return proper status codes
Add rate limiting to our API endpoints using Redis — allow 100 requests per minute per IP address with a sliding window
